tree.name: Cedric Coward
tree.tradeDescription: Memphis traded Yang Hansen (16th pick), 2027 2nd (ATL own), 2028 1st (ORL own), and 2028 2nd (SAC own) to Portland for Cedric Coward
tree.note: Eastern Washington forward, acquired from Portland on draft night

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#16)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Memphis traded Desmond Bane and 2026 1st swap to Orlando for KCP, Cole Anthony, 2025 1st (ORL own, 16th pick Yang Hansen), 2028 1st (ORL own), 2029 1st swap, and 2030 1st (ORL own)
assetsGivenUp.note: Orlando's own 2025 1st round pick, acquired in Bane trade; Hansen drafted 16th, sent to Portland

assetsGivenUp.name: Desmond Bane
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: MEM sent 2023 2nd (Keyonte Johnson) and 2025 2nd (MEM own, Kobe Sanders) to BOS, cash to POR; BOS sent Bane (#30) to MEM; POR sent Mario Hezonja to MEM
assetsGivenUp.note: TCU guard, drafted 30th overall by Boston, traded to MEM

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 2nd Round Pick (#49)
assetsGivenUp.note: Memphis' own 2023 2nd round pick equivalent, sent to Boston in Bane trade
